body:
Two things, keeping this repo aligned with the reviewed literature-template stack:

- **Remove review-nudge** (workflow + `post-review-nudge` CLI + `review-nudge.ts` + tests + docs entry): the nudge PR was dropped from the literature-template stack in review (literature-template#46); this repo inherited it from the pre-review stack tip.
- **Landing page + mobile nav fixes** (mirrors literature-template#49's follow-up commit, from lean `bfbac6b5`/`260ea2b1`/`5ca879f7`): the landing card now shares every other page's width and top alignment — capped content column (`minmax(0, 70rem)`) with a flexible right spacer instead of the index-only 85%-centered single-column layout — and search/darkmode declare array-form placements so the mobile nav bar renders search on its own row and the theme toggle standalone.

Verified locally: `npm run check` and a full site build pass.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01KSJ1viQV4pp3hcWo9u5oPV

title: Landing page grid, mobile nav placements; drop inherited review-nudge
